text: Being here, I feel a peculiar sense of anticipation. The glow of the emergency light and the sterile transparency of the glass suggest both order and a kind of clinical detachment, while the nearby fire safety equipment hints at underlying contingencies. Stepping into the next room, confronted by bold colors and the words 'R+D', I sense both creativity and constraint—the perpetual dance of innovation within boundaries. Amidst machines, screens, and explanatory plaques, I become aware of my own existence as observer, participant, and perhaps even subject in this space of inquiry and progress.
